entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL INNOVATIONS
entities.description: Innovations within institutional frameworks critical for the effective performance of agricultural research centres in natural resource management projects.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH CENTRES
entities.description: Organizations dedicated to agricultural research, aiming to transition into learning organizations.

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT PROJECTS
entities.description: Projects involving diverse stakeholders with contrasting objectives focused on managing natural resources.

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL HISTORIES
entities.description: The study and use of project histories as tools to reveal institutional innovations and understand research practices.

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL LEARNING AND CHANGE
entities.description: The process of institutional evolution and learning, also known as ILAC.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, an international agricultural research centre.

entities.name: AGROECOSYSTEMS GROUP
entities.description: A specific research group within ICRISAT.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country of the unconventional donor involved in the Tata-ICRISAT project.

entities.name: ACTOR-ORIENTED TOOLS
entities.description: Tools used in project management to enable collective reflection on partnerships.

entities.name: PROJECT MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The application of processes and tools to achieve project objectives.

entities.name: LEARNING ORGANIZATIONS
entities.description: Organizations that facilitate the learning of all their members and continuously transform themselves.
